evals.prompt: I have a Capacitor app using @capacitor-mlkit/barcode-scanning (Google ML Kit) for barcode scanning. I want to replace it with Scandit BarcodeCapture. Here is my scanner: MlkitScanner.ts
evals.expected_output: Removes the @capacitor-mlkit/barcode-scanning APIs (BarcodeScanner.scan / startScan / addListener, BarcodeFormat) and adds a Scandit BarcodeCapture integration with the equivalent symbologies, preserving the ScannedProduct shape, the deduplication logic, and the summary rendering. Shows a setup checklist and a summary of changes.

assertions.text: @capacitor-mlkit/barcode-scanning is NOT imported in the output code (it may appear in a before/after summary table)
BarcodeScanner.scan( is NOT called in the new code (it may appear in a before/after summary table)
BarcodeScanner.startScan( is NOT called in the new code (it may appear in a before/after summary table)
BarcodeFormat does NOT appear as an enum used in the new code (it may appear in a before/after summary table)
await ScanditCaptureCorePlugin.initializePlugins() is present
DataCaptureContext.initialize( is present (v8 API)
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is NOT present
new BarcodeCapture(settings) is present (not BarcodeCapture.forContext)
context.setMode( is called to register the mode
Symbology.EAN13UPCA is enabled (maps the ML Kit Ean13 and UpcA formats)
Symbology.EAN8 is enabled (maps the ML Kit Ean8 format)
Symbology.Code128 is enabled (maps the ML Kit Code128 format)
Symbology.QR is enabled (maps the ML Kit QrCode format)
DataCaptureView.forContext( is present
view.connectToElement( is called
new BarcodeCaptureOverlay( is present
view.addOverlay( is called
barcodeCapture.addListener( registers a listener object with a didScan callback
session.newlyRecognizedBarcode is read inside didScan (semantic)
The ScannedProduct shape (value/format fields) is preserved in the output
The deduplication logic (checking the code does not already exist before adding) is preserved (semantic)
The renderSummary function and count-label update are preserved
Setup checklist mentions scandit-capacitor-datacapture-core and scandit-capacitor-datacapture-barcode packages
Setup checklist mentions npx cap sync
Setup checklist mentions iOS Info.plist NSCameraUsageDescription
A summary of changes is shown describing what ML Kit APIs were removed and what Scandit APIs replaced them
